---
title: "Simurg test program 1"
subtitle: "[Name Family_name]"
author: "M&S Decisions, `r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
    bookdown::html_document2:
      toc: true
      toc_depth: 5
      toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: false
      number_sections: true
      code_folding: hide
      fig_width: 10
      fig_height: 7
      fig_caption: true
      
    officedown::rdocx_document:
      reference_docx: document_template.docx
---

```{r load-packages-and-set-global-settings, include=TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
rm(list=ls())
set.seed(123456)

library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(flextable)
library(officer)
library(officedown)
library(rxode2)
library(SimuRg)

theme_set(theme_bw())
theme_update(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
MSDcol <- rep(c("#1a1866", "#f2b93b", "#b73b58", "#a2d630", "#5839bb", "#9c4ec7", "#3a6eba", "#efdd3c", "#69686d"), 10)
NEWcol <- c("dodgerblue", "seagreen2", "forestgreen", "orange2", "firebrick", "royalblue4",  "violetred1",  "black", "blue", "red", "purple", "gold", "skyblue3", "tan4", "plum2")

set_flextable_defaults(
  font.family = "Arial",
  font.size = 8,
  theme_fun = "theme_vanilla",
  table.layout = "autofit"
  )

knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, echo = TRUE, fig.cap = TRUE, fig.align = "center", results = 'hide') 
if (!knitr::is_html_output()) {knitr::opts_chunk$set(include = FALSE)}
if (!knitr::is_html_output()) {
run_num_tab <- run_autonum(seq_id = "Table", pre_label = "Table ", bkm = "anytable")
run_num_fig <- run_autonum(seq_id = "Figure", pre_label = "Figure ", bkm = "anyfigure")
}
```

```{r load-functions}

```

#  Section 1

```{r r-code-chunk-name-1}

```

## Section 2

### Section 3

```{r plot-chunk-name-1, fig.id = "plot-chunk-name-1", fig.width = 10, fig.height = 3.75, fig.cap = "Figure caption"}
# ggplot()
```

```{r table-chunk-name-1, results = 'asis', tab.cap = "Table caption"}
# flextable(tab_out) %>% set_table_properties(width = 1, layout = "autofit") %>% hline(part = "body")
```

# R Runtime Environment {.tabset}
## Current R session {.unnumbered}
```{r sourcefile}
source_file <- basename(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
```

**Source file:** `r source_file`
```{r rsession, results='asis'}
# Print a record of the environment in which this script was rendered
info <- sessionInfo()
```

```{r tab-rsession-env}
# R Version
info$R.version %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  select(version.string, platform) %>%
  rename(
    `R version` = version.string,
    Platform = platform
  ) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  set_table_properties(width = 1, layout = "autofit")
```

## Base Packages {.unnumbered}
```{r tab-rsession-base}
# Base Packages
tibble(Package = info$basePkgs) %>%
  arrange(Package) %>%
  flextable() %>% 
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit", width = 0.4)
```

## Attached Packages {.unnumbered}
```{r tab-rsession-attached}
# Attached Packages
info$otherPkgs %>%
  purrr::map_dfr(~ tibble(Package = .x$Package, Version = .x$Version)) %>%
  arrange(Package) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit", width = 0.4)
```

## Loaded Packages {.unnumbered}
```{r tab-rsession-loaded}
# Loaded Packages
info$loadedOnly %>%
  purrr::map_dfr(~ tibble(Package = .x$Package, Version = .x$Version)) %>%
  arrange(Package) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit", width = 0.4)
```

## {-}
